artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA system showing the Modulating Valve Faceplate for Reactor Gate No.3 with a position feedback graph.
artifact_blurb: A detailed screenshot of a Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) interface displaying the operational status of a Modulating Valve Faceplate designated for Reactor Gate No.3. The view includes a real-time position feedback graph calibrated from 0% to 100%, illustrating the valve's current actuation state within the industrial control environment.
